submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-05-cancel-expr-false
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency:
  group: cancel-expr-false
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ false }}
jobs:
  long:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: sleep-a-bit
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=05-cancel-expr-false"
          sleep 5
          echo "DONE=05"
